---
title: "Route network simplification for transport planning"
description: "Will Deakin, Zhao Wang, Josiah Parry, and Robin Lovelace (2025). Route network simplification for transport planning. *Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science*. https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251387986"
date: "2025-10-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "deakin_route_network_2025"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science"
doi: "10.1177/23998083251387986"
publication-url: "https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251387986"
authors:
  - "Will Deakin"
  - "Zhao Wang"
  - "Josiah Parry"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science
**Year:** 2025

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251387986) [URL](https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251387986) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Will Deakin, Zhao Wang, Josiah Parry, and Robin Lovelace (2025). Route network simplification for transport planning. *Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science*. https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251387986

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{deakin_route_network_2025,
  title = {Route network simplification for transport planning},
  author = {Deakin, Will and Wang, Zhao and Parry, Josiah and Lovelace, Robin},
  date = {2025-10},
  journaltitle = {Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science},
  issn = {2399-8083},
  doi = {10.1177/23998083251387986},
  url = {https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251387986},
  pages = {23998083251387986},
  langid = {english}
}
```

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
